description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- User Management: User Principal Name and SAM Account Name are now editable
- User Management: Manager field is now editable with a Browse button to search and select users from AD
- Domain Settings: Added Test Connection button per domain row. Tests and logs detailed troubleshooting info (connected DC, exception details, HRESULT, contextual hints) to the Activity Log
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Offboard Users: Combined Step 3 and Offboard Logs into a single card with Export Logs and Clear Logs buttons
- Offboard Users: Selections (checkboxes, Move OU path, Description text) are now remembered across app sessions
- AD Cleanup: MessageBox summary now shown after Disable/Move/Delete actions with success and failure counts
- AD Cleanup: Standardized action button colors to grey for a cleaner look
